title: Plum Dash Dum
description: A light and smoky Ethiopian dish featuring plum jam, dum, and a dash-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of rice flour (or amchera)
ingredients.notes: Prepared by mixing flour and water to form a dough

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: For frying the dumplings and coating them with oil

instructions: Blend the plum jam with a splash of water until smooth.
Mix rice flour and enough water to form a soft dough. Knead until smooth.
Divide the dough into small balls. Roll each ball in your hands to make dumplings, about 2 inches in diameter.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the prepared dumplings and fry them until golden brown on both sides.
Carefully place the fried dumplings into the plum jam mixture, making sure they are fully coated with the sauce. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes to allow the dumplings to absorb the flavors.
Remove from heat and serve hot. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
